title: Privacy Policy
intro: LeClap runs entirely in your browser. The photos and videos you choose or record are processed on your device and are never uploaded to a server.

local.heading: On-device processing
local.body: Every step — trimming, effects, music and the final render — runs locally with WebAssembly and FFmpeg. Your media stays on your device and is never sent anywhere.

data.heading: Data we collect
data.body: None. LeClap has no account system and no backend server. It does not collect personal information and includes no analytics or tracking.

storage.heading: Browser storage
storage.body: LeClap uses your browser's local storage only to remember preferences such as theme and language, and to keep your in-progress projects on your device. You can clear it at any time from your browser settings.

thirdParty.heading: Third-party resources
thirdParty.body: Some assets — fonts, the FFmpeg core and sample media — are loaded from public CDNs and GitHub. Those requests reach the providers directly and follow their own policies; no personal data is attached to them.

contact.heading: Questions
contact.body: For any question about this policy, reach out through the project on GitHub at github.com/heristop/leclap.
